items.title: Tech on Atlanta's Keshon Gilbert for protesting a reach-in call. The fine for a summer league tech is two bottles of seltzer walter are removed from his minibar fridge. Charges won't be applied until checkout.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Tech on Atlanta's Keshon Gilbert for protesting a reach-in call. The fine for a summer league tech is two bottles of seltzer walter are removed from his minibar fridge. Charges won't be applied until checkout.

items.title: The Hawks have quite an impressive "second unit" at Summer League when you're looking at RayJ Dennis, Keshon Gilbert, Kobe Johnson, Jacob Toppin, and Henri Veesaar coming off the bench.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks have quite an impressive "second unit" at Summer League when you're looking at RayJ Dennis, Keshon Gilbert, Kobe Johnson, Jacob Toppin, and Henri Veesaar coming off the bench.

All 5 of those guys have either played in the NBA before or might soon.
